---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for PrivyDesk
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 💡 Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Is your feature request related to a problem?
Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## 🎯 Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this feature working.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📊 Use Case
Describe the use case(s) for this feature. Who would benefit from it?

## 🎨 Mockups/Examples
(Optional) Add mockups, screenshots, or examples from other products.

## 📈 Business Value
How would this feature benefit PrivyDesk users?
- [ ] Improves productivity
- [ ] Reduces costs
- [ ] Enhances user experience
- [ ] Competitive advantage
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 🔧 Technical Considerations
(Optional) Any technical details or implementation ideas.

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context or information about the feature request.

## ⭐ Priority
How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Critical - Can't use PrivyDesk without it
- [ ] High - Would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Just an idea
